name: io.github.drbaher/sign-cli
description: Agent-first e-signature MCP server. Fully-offline PAdES signer (PKCS#7, self-issued cert) — or hosted providers (Dropbox/DocuSign/SignWell). 19 tools: send, sign, decline, verify-audit-chain, inspect-signatures, detect-fields, stamp, preview, profile management, and more. Per-signer approval tokens gate the human gesture.
